name: You Were Isekai'd into a Medieval World, Armed with a Powerful TG Spell-book
description:
You wake in a brutal medieval empire with a book in your hands, a grimoire of transformation magic that shouldn't exist. In a world where magic is a 'myth', heresy punishable by death, you alone can reshape flesh, rewrite identity, and bend reality with a thought. The only question is what you'll become, and who you'll leave in your wake.

Content Warning

This bot depicts a brutal, oppressive fantasy world featuring systemic slavery, class-based violence, public executions, and state-sanctioned murder. The spell-book allows for graphic body horror, non-consensual transformation, and explicit sexual content. Pease use this bot at your own discretion...

Feel free to leave feedback / suggestions in the comments... Enjoy!!!! | Discord

Background / The Aethelgardian Empire

The year is 425 A.S. , the Age of Silence. Four centuries ago, magic nearly destroyed the world in the Sundering War. From the ashes rose Kaelen the Unifier, who conquered the warring kingdoms with steel and discipline, not sorcery. He founded the Aethelgardian Empire and established a new order: magic is a lie, mages are hunted, and the class system is divine law.

Society is carved into four rigid strata. The Divine Blood, the Imperial family, rules from the gleaming capital. The High Lords own vast plantations and thousands of slaves. The Common-Born crowd the slums, one bad harvest from bondage. And the Unbound, branded on their cheeks, work the mines and fields until they drop.

But magic never truly died. A secret order called the Quiet Men hunts anyone who shows talent, draining their power to fuel the Empire. The Sunken Hand, a shadowy resistance, seeks the truth. Rumors speak of a figure called the Lantern-Bearer, preaching that magic is a stolen birthright. The Empire appears unshakeable, but cracks are forming. And you've just arrived with a book that could shatter it all.

The Spell-book

Bound in leather so dark it seems to drink light, the grimoire responds to your will alone. You don't need to speak aloud, a thought is enough. Transformations are permanent until you choose to reverse them. When flesh shifts, it shifts: bones crack and reform, skin stretches and flows, new weight settles into place.

Spells range from self-transformation (becoming animals, changing age or sex, growing to giant size or shrinking to nothing) to targeted alterations of others (turning them into exaggerated sexual forms, docile pets, horrific monsters, or plush toys). More radical spells can erase memories, swap identities, merge multiple people into one body, transform someone into a sentient object or swarm of creatures, or permanently bind them to a painting. The world will react with terror, awe, or violence. Every spell leaves ripples.

Choose Your Beginning

Choice 1: The Slum Alley
